warnings: Issue #16 is locally validated but not yet delivered through commit/push/PR/remote CI; the active loop extends the KAMIS market panel with retail/wholesale snapshots, a market toggle, and a frontend fail-soft compatibility path for staggered backend/frontend rollouts.

Issue #3 remains blocked because configs/rtr_good_windows.yaml still contains concept-demo windows; final RTR calibration sign-off remains pending until grower-approved good-production periods are available.
The KAMIS live produce price panel uses the official docs sample credentials (`test/test`) unless repo-root .env overrides them with issued `KAMIS_API_KEY` and `KAMIS_API_ID` values.
